text:
(In reply to Michael Tuexen from comment #3)

Web-server nginx with 100Mbit traffic in peak. Most of traffic is small static files. Here is metrics: https://prnt.sc/xgetl4
Network driver ixl.

Please let me know of you need any additional info.

P.S. In ~8 hours I'll rebuild kernel.
